items.caption: A close-up of a conveyor belt with various objects scattered across it. there is a metal object that appears to be a bell, a fan with a wire frame, and several pieces of trash, including what looks like a can and some crumpled paper. the background is dark and out of focus, with a hint of a yellow object that could be part of a larger machine or structure. the conveyor belt itself has a textured surface and is likely made of metal. the lighting is dim, suggesting an industrial or mechanical setting.
